violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. Walk in cooler has products temping at 44-45 degrees F.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. Convection ovens not adequately located under hood.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Coffee counter damaged and has peeling laminate surface. Walk in cooler shelving rusting.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Prep table cooler on cook line, BOH microwave, dry goods storage containers in BOH, convection oven, have build-up of food and debris and needs cleaning.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Shelving units in walk in cooler have rust/food debris and need cleaning. Line cooking equipment/shelving needs cleaning.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood system needs cleaning.

Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. Use test strips on a regular basis to ensure proper chemical sanitizing concentrations are maintained. Dish machine not maintained.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical ware washing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. Container of sanitizing agent empty.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors on cook line, BOH prep area, storage areas, and in walk in units need cleaning. Walk in cooler has an over accumulation of food and debris matted to the floor. Needs deep cleaning.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Wall at prep counter on cook line has flaking plaster and peeling paint.

Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Insect electrocution or trapping device was installed in an inappropriate location. Hang and place fly traps away away from work surfaces/areas in BOH kitchen and on cook line.

Food service manager certification. — --Person in charge did not hold an approved food service manager certificate. Person (part-time employee) who holds manager's certificate has been out of the establishment for a couple of weeks. Medical reasons. Unsure if/when employee will return.
